info.description: A clothing item — add sizes, colors, prices and how many you have below

name.description: Product name customers see on the website

link_name.description: Filled in automatically — used for the product page link

description.description: A few sentences about this product

photo.description: Main picture customers see for this product

highlight_on_homepage.description: Tick to show this product on the homepage

mark_as_new.description: Tick to show a "New" label on the website

category.description: Which section this product belongs to

sizes_and_colors.description: Each row is one size + color with its own price and how many are left
